creature does nothing this turno
9-10 The creature can act and move normally.

entities.name: creature doesn't take an action this turn

data.description: On the creature's next turn, it can use its reaction to take an action as normal.

entities.name: The creature doesn't move or take actions this turn

data.description: During the creature's next turn, it remains motionless and takes no actions.

entities.name: The creature can act and move normally.

data.description: The creature can take its action and move as normal.
